overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player moves from a shaded area under an overpass with digital billboards, transitions past a commercial building with outdoor seating, continues along an industrial waterfront with refineries and smokestacks, and ends in an open plaza with palm trees approaching a food stand. The scene features bright midday sunlight, cyberpunk architecture mixing industrial and commercial elements, and sparse pedestrian activity.

segments.scene_description: Walking under a massive concrete highway overpass in a semi-covered urban corridor. A large digital billboard advertising a vehicle dominates the view ahead, while a yellow commercial building with green outdoor umbrellas sits to the right. Sparse pedestrians walk through the mixed lighting of shadows and sunlight, with steam rising from a ground vent near the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront promenade with pipeline infrastructure

events.description: exiting the covered overpass area into open industrial waterfront
slight left turn to follow the waterfront path

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront path passing the yellow building and approaching industrial structures

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the water's edge
tall red-brick industrial structure with multiple windows and signage
green elevated transit track spanning across the skyline

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into the open industrial waterfront district. The yellow commercial building now falls behind on the left as the path curves along the water's edge. A metal railing lines the right side of the walkway, while a large red industrial building and elevated monorail tracks dominate the distant skyline ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront with refinery complex and smokestacks

turning right to follow the curved waterfront path

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial waterfront with views of the refinery and city skyline

entered.detail: large industrial complex with multiple smokestacks emitting white smoke
network of yellow and gray industrial pipes and valves
low concrete wall separating walkway from water

segments.scene_description: The path opens to a wide industrial waterfront with expansive views of a massive refinery complex. Multiple smokestacks emit white smoke into the clear blue sky. The camera follows the curved walkway, revealing extensive industrial piping systems along the right side while the monorail track shifts toward the right of the frame. The area is devoid of pedestrians, emphasizing the industrial atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open concrete plaza with palm trees approaching commercial food stand

events.description: moving from industrial waterfront into open plaza with palm trees
slight right turn toward the food stand building

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward the commercial building with the food advertisement

small commercial building with large orange advertisement showing food items

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open concrete plaza with palm trees providing sparse vegetation. The camera approaches a small commercial food stand building featuring a large orange advertisement displaying food items. The industrial refinery remains visible in the distant background on the right, while the overpass structure recedes into the distance on the left. The area maintains the bright midday lighting with clear skies overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded urban corridor that gradually opens into a bright, expansive industrial waterfront and plaza. It begins under a massive concrete highway overpass dominated by a large digital billboard, passing a yellow commercial building with green umbrellas and rising steam. As the camera emerges from the shadows into the midday sun, the path curves along a metal railing, leaving the commercial area behind to reveal a distant skyline of red industrial buildings and elevated monorail tracks. The scene then expands across a wide waterfront, where the view is overtaken by a massive refinery complex with smokestacks emitting white smoke into a clear blue sky. Finally, the camera moves away from the industrial piping and toward an open concrete plaza with palm trees, approaching a food stand with a large orange advertisement while the refinery remains visible in the distance.
